content.text:
All three changes have been applied successfully. Here is a summary of what was done:

---

### 1. CampaignRedemption type -- added missing fields

**File**: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\packages\shared\src\types\index.ts` (lines 173-184)

The `CampaignRedemption` interface was expanded with three new fields and two type changes:
- Added `redemption_token: string`
- Added `is_redeemed: boolean`
- Added `expires_at: string | null`
- Added `created_at: string`
- Changed `redeemed_at` from `string` to `string | null`

### 2. CustomerScanSuccessData type -- new interface added

**File**: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\packages\shared\src\types\index.ts` (lines 189-199)

A new `CustomerScanSuccessData` interface was added right after `CampaignRedemption`, containing fields for scan result data: `merchant_name`, `points_earned`, `stamps_earned`, `total_points`, `stamps_current_card`, `stamps_per_card`, `card_completed`, `card_id`, and the optional `offerToken`.

### 3. Button component -- now accepts children

**File**: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\components\ui\Button.tsx`

Three changes were made:
- The `ButtonProps` interface was exported and updated: `title` is now optional (`string?`), and a new `children?: React.ReactNode` prop was added (lines 13-15).
- The `children` prop is destructured in the function signature (line 27).
- The text rendering uses `{children ?? title}` so that `children` takes precedence over `title` when both are provided (line 81).
